rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Mimikatz Module Names in Command Line (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Mimikatz Module Names in Command Line (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: ca5d91c2-3411-4085-a003-d7df8ce60244
status: experimental
description: Detects presence of common Mimikatz module names in command line strings.
  Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/mimikatz/
- https://github.com/gentilkiwi/mimikatz/wiki (for additional module names)
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.s0002
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - sekurlsa::logonpasswords
    - lsadump::sam
    - sekurlsa::minidump
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
